text.title: Risk Assessment Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Pre-launch risk register for an AI SaaS
example.note: Identified 14 candidate risks across product, market, regulatory, financial, operational dimensions. R-001 Single-vendor LLM lock-in: P50 0.35, severity 4, owner=cto, trigger='provider raises price >40% YoY OR uptime <99.5%', decision=mitigate (dual-provider abstraction). R-002 GDPR data-processing fine: P50 0.08, severity 5, owner=legal_lead, decision=mitigate. Top 7 kept; 7 parked. Register fits on 1 page.
